summary: Login Performance Fix Testing Complete. All tests pass - Backend (13/13) and Frontend E2E (7/7). Verified: 1) Login API response time <0.5s (was 30+ seconds before), 2) profile_picture excluded from login response, 3) New /users/{uid}/profile-picture endpoint works correctly, 4) /api/user/{uid} and /api/users/{uid} exclude profile_picture, 5) Frontend login flow works fast (<5 seconds total).

minor.issue: Login response contains profile_picture field with None value (due to Pydantic model defaults). While the large base64 data is excluded, the key still exists. Minor performance impact only.
Mobile numbers with special characters (+91-xxx) cause MongoDB regex error (OperationFailure: Regular expression is invalid). Known limitation - special chars in identifier break the regex pattern.

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use existing admin user credentials admin@paras.com/153759
context_for_next_testing_agent:
## Login Performance Fix Tests Complete

### Key Findings:
1. **Performance Fix Working**: Login API now returns in <0.5s (was 30+ seconds due to 246KB base64 profile_picture)
2. **Response Size**: Login response is now ~2.5KB (previously 250KB+)
3. **New Endpoint**: GET /api/users/{uid}/profile-picture returns profile picture separately
4. **Exclusions Working**: Both /api/user/{uid} and /api/users/{uid} exclude profile_picture from response

### Test Files Created:
- Backend: /app/backend/tests/test_login_performance_fix.py (13 tests)
  - TestLoginPerformance: response time, size, profile_picture absence
  - TestProfilePictureEndpoint: new endpoint structure and 404 handling
  - TestUserEndpointExcludesProfilePicture: user endpoints validation
  - TestLoginFlowEndToEnd: full login flow tests

- Frontend: /app/tests/e2e/login-performance-fix.spec.ts (7 tests)
  - Login page load time
  - Login completion time (<5s)
  - Dashboard load after login
  - Profile page navigation
  - API response validation

### Minor Issues Found (not blocking):
1. Pydantic model adds profile_picture: None to response (key exists but no data)
2. Mobile numbers with special chars (+91-xxx) break MongoDB regex in login

### Test Credentials:
- Email: admin@paras.com
- PIN: 153759
- User Role: admin (redirects to /admin after login)
